user_query: Child has some messy lunches that won't pack well for school - delete a few options that sounds hard to transport or eat cleanly.
nodes_to_delete: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Child > Day 2 > Lunch > Chicken Noodle Soup — Citrus Fresh Twist
Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Child > Day 5 > Lunch > Teriyaki Chicken Bowl — Garden Veg Style
reasoning: Selected items that clearly conflict with 'easy to pack / eat cleanly' — the soup (spill risk) and the saucy teriyaki bowl (sticky, messy). Excluded the Salmon Salad Wrap and Veggie Quesadilla because wraps and quesadillas are generally portable and can be eaten with minimal mess; the Mediterranean Grain Bowl was left intact as it can be packed in a container and eaten with a fork with less spill risk than soup or saucy bowls.
